resident.name: workbench-directory-link-valid-tail
resident.reason: The chain-walker closure adds the valid terminal-sector witness.

resident.name: workbench-directory-link-valid-next
resident.reason: The chain-walker closure adds the valid next-sector witness.

resident.name: workbench-directory-link-rejects-wrong-track
resident.reason: The chain-walker closure rejects a directory link outside track 40.

resident.name: workbench-directory-link-rejects-self-reference
resident.reason: The chain-walker closure rejects a self-referential directory link.

resident.name: workbench-repl-banner-return
resident.reason: The Wave-1 banner is new dialect-v2 product functionality and intentionally uses the ABI-v2 poke primitive. It is checked against the frozen post-filter observation baseline, not executed inside a mutable historical source profile.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-direct
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface adds the direct read-from-string route.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-funcall
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface adds the funcall read-from-string route.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-apply
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface adds the apply read-from-string route.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-first-object
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface pins first-object reader semantics.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-type-error
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface pins the type-error route.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-arity-zero
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface pins strict zero-argument rejection.

resident.name: v11-g-read-from-string-arity-extra
resident.reason: The owner-authorized Wave-2 Green Surface pins strict extra-argument rejection.

resident.name: workbench-compile-string-bad-destination
resident.reason: The transactional FASL composition cut replaces the obsolete fixed-slot failure with a bad-destination witness.

resident.name: workbench-compile-string-bad-destination-error
resident.reason: The transactional FASL composition cut pins its bad-destination diagnostic.

ide.name: ide-disk-link-valid-tail
ide.reason: The completed chain-walker inventory adds the IDE terminal-link witness.

ide.name: ide-disk-link-rejects-zero-tail
ide.reason: The completed chain-walker inventory pins the corrupt zero-tail clamp.

ide.name: ide-disk-link-rejects-self-reference
ide.reason: The completed chain-walker inventory rejects an IDE self-link.

ide.name: ide-disk-link-rejects-out-of-range
ide.reason: The completed chain-walker inventory rejects an out-of-range IDE link.

ide.name: ide-event-command-delete-backward
ide.reason: The 16-name harvest adds a permanent echo witness for the numeric delete-backward token.

ide.name: ide-buffer-default-mode-id
ide.reason: The 16-name harvest adds a permanent echo witness for the numeric lisp-mode token.

idex.name: ide-extra-unknown-mx-command-rejected
idex.reason: The 16-name harvest adds the required negative M-x echo witness.

m65d.name: m65d-buffer-payload-composition-external
m65d.reason: The transactional FASL composition cut adds the Buffer-payload external D81 witness.

m65d.name: m65d-buffer-payload-composition-bad-type
m65d.reason: The transactional FASL composition cut pins invalid Buffer-payload rejection.

resident.name: workbench-compile-slot-capacity-host
resident.reason: Wave-2 M removes the fixed-slot writer and its slot-capacity surface.

resident.name: workbench-compile-string-missing-slot
resident.reason: Wave-2 M removes the preallocated-slot seam in favor of arbitrary M65D COW destinations.

resident.name: workbench-compile-string-missing-slot-error
resident.reason: Wave-2 M retires the obsolete missing-slot diagnostic with the fixed-slot seam.

ide.name: ide-event-command-self-insert
ide.reason: The 16-name harvest replaces the internal self-insert symbol token with its pinned numeric command ID.
